notes: V2 new class. ⊑ iao:0000310 (iao:Document). A written editorial unit about events; not the events themselves. Matches Post / PodcastEpisode placement under iao:Document in modules/media.ttl. Deterministic IRI = https://w3id.org/energy-intel/narrative/{story-stem}; story stem is filename without extension; arc directory does NOT enter the IRI; duplicate stems are import errors.

V2 new class. ⊑ iao:0000310 (iao:Document). Reified n-ary relation: one individual per (narrative, post) pair, carrying the role qualifier. Reified rather than 4 role-named predicates because role-named predicates would smuggle storage state into predicate names (System Blueprint anti-pattern) and not absorb future first-class qualifier storage cleanly. Deterministic IRI = https://w3id.org/energy-intel/narrative/{story-stem}/membership/{post-uri-hash}.
V2 new object property. Domain ei:Narrative; range ei:NarrativePostMembership. Cardinality `many`; order is not preserved (per scope-v2.md Open Question 3).
V2 new object property; owl:FunctionalProperty. Domain ei:NarrativePostMembership; range ei:Post. Functional 1: each membership references exactly one post.

V2 new object property; owl:FunctionalProperty. Domain ei:NarrativePostMembership; range skos:Concept (constrained by SHACL to concepts in scheme ei:concept/narrative-role). Functional 1: each membership has exactly one role.

V2 new object property. Domain ei:Narrative; range foaf:Person (V1-widened from ei:Expert). Auto-derived from contained posts on import; reviewable via MCP. Asserted explicitly when import-time auto-derivation runs; CQ-N6 also walks the membership chain as a fallback.
V2 new object property. Domain ei:Narrative; range skos:Concept (SHACL-constrained to ei:concept/argument-pattern scheme). Cardinality 0..1. Mirrors current Story.argument_pattern.
V2 new object property. Domain ei:Narrative; range owl:Thing (SHACL-constrained to owl:Class ∪ skos:Concept per granularity contract; never owl:NamedIndividual). Topic = OEO IRI ∪ supplement IRI.

V2 new SKOS ConceptScheme at ei:concept/argument-pattern. Declares 7 skos:Concept instances: deployment-milestone, emergent-technology-bulletin, geographic-energy-project, grid-snapshot, learning-curve, methodological-critique, structural-economic-analysis. Each carries skos:prefLabel, skos:definition, optional skos:related, optional skos:editorialNote (status: active|draft|deprecated). Replaces the prior owl:Class + ABoxed individuals modeling per source plan §S4.

V2 new SKOS ConceptScheme at ei:concept/narrative-role. Declares 4 skos:Concept instances: lead, supporting, counter, context. Each carries skos:prefLabel and skos:definition. Used as the range constraint of ei:memberRole.

V2 retires V1's hand-rolled SKOS scheme at modules/concept-schemes/technology-seeds.ttl and replaces it with topic IRIs sourced from OEO + Skygest supplements. Per-scheme split (single ei:concept/topic vs split + aggregator) decided in Phase 2 (scope-v2.md Open Question 1). Each supplement IRI carries skos:prefLabel, skos:definition, optional skos:exactMatch / skos:closeMatch to OEO IRIs, and skos:notation carrying the legacy topic_slug.

OEO term — solar power technology. Phase 2 candidate runtime topic IRI. Verified to exist in oeo-full.owl per source plan §3.4. Granularity check: owl:Class (passes); not NamedIndividual; technology-class granularity (passes editorial contract).
OEO term — wind power technology. Phase 2 candidate runtime topic IRI.
OEO term — offshore wind power technology. Replaces dropped OEO_00000308 (offshore wind farm) which fails the granularity contract (installation, not topic).
OEO term — nuclear power technology. Replaces dropped OEO_00010415 (bare 'nuclear') which is polysemous; pinned to the technology class.
OEO term — bioenergy. Phase 2 candidate; granularity verification needed.
